review_title: Easy way to design your app for a fair price
description: Thanks to Uizard I now don't have to just imagine my idea in mind but I can quickly sketch it. Makes the process of creating a design much faster.
author: Rostislav Z.
pros: How simple it looks and is easy to use. User learns quickly how a what to do. But that also means you will quickly find those limitations. Still a great solution for the price.
cons: Some missing features like ability to fix something on the screen, so it would stay in the place even when you are scrolling another content (navigation bar, top bar, etc.). I am also missing the possibility of creating different shapes then rectangulars.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Perfect for early stage startups.
description: The problem was to create our Cardio device's app prototype as fast as possible, so that we can show it do doctors and get early feedback before starting to code/implement it. And it took several days with several iteration to finalize the prototype. Doctors could click on it and use in interactive mode. Doctors were giving feedback to a product and that didn't exist yet. That was sooo time-saving.
author: Lilit H.
pros: The ready-to-go templates, for example, you need to have some list on one of your pages, and boom, there is a template, don't do it manually.
cons: I am still waiting for the feature to copy a picture somewhere and paste into Uizard without having to download and upload it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Worst UI Platform Never buy it
author: Saibaba A.
pros: Just the speed of development of the design.
cons: You loose your entire work you have done for weeks, months in matter of seconds completely unreliable service. Our Project did not use to load properly, Memory Hog on Browser, We lost our entire project because their website cannot load the project. All your money spend on user reserach and designers is gone in matter of unexpected moments. It will put you behind all the time that was dedicated, No granular control even basic things underline for text grid alignment, basic controls not present, Generative AI is slob it can handle screen generation with consistent layout atleast for even medium size projects, No Compensation framework users who are victims for this stumbling company, They didnt fix the project loss that happened to me for 2 Years users have been reporting the problem for two years.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Enables us to collect our thoughts in minutes!
description: Uizard has helped us solve the collection of first thoughts that come into mind when discovering our own product in a very quick time. I will definitely use Uizard again in the future.
author: Hardy K.
pros: You don't need any prior experience in software design. You just need an idea and start drawing.
cons: Combination of mobile, desktop projects would be needed together with more out-of-box elements.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great alternative to Figma
author: Sebastian A.
pros: I love how easy is to create the UI on the platform. Using the AI to convert my sketches into the UI elements I need is great! It really gives you a feeling that your sketches can be even more valuable. It is more joyful to be able to sketch by hand and knowing it will help you after.
cons: As an early software there is things missing, specially if you want to design desktop apps! They are strongly focused on mobile. It's not bad, but it would be plus if they cover also computer devices.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mobile Application developer
description: I loved it, it had made alot of prototypes easier and helped me through out the process
author: Mhamad R.
pros: I only build mobile application, and i have only used uizard for that it has been a great easy experience that has everything you need
cons: I actually didnt have any problem with this so far and i have used it for near 2 years
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Clean system with a few frustrating problems
description: A solid 4/5 stars, granted there are some bugs, but presuming they sort them out and improve the general UX that those bugs degrade, this software will be a must have for ALL of my development in the future
author: Terran G.
pros: The system is slick and makes it fast and easy to create above average wire-frame UI's that my partners and I can collaborate and communicate on
cons: There are a number of frustrating issues with mouse clicking forcing dragging of elements rather than being click and drag as well as what appears to be bugs with the colour system and inaccessible colour pallete selection. Nothing that makes me turn away from the software, but definitely leads to a few less than savory comments made at my screen when I misclick and the UI gets messed up or the colour I want can't be selected.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Uizard is definitely a beginner friendly software!
description: I was so pleased with the result of my prototype and it made me feel like I was already using the App that I made! It was so easy to create your own prototype yet when you are testing the prototype already, it seems like you did a whole lot but it's not! I did try using other software but to be honest, I am not being biased here! Haha, Uizard is the best! Also, I am not a techy person, I literally have no idea about such things but I felt like a pro doing and using my prototype haha!
author: Mariella P.
pros: Given that it was my first time trying to make a prototype, I literally have no clue about what to do and how to start but Uizard made their software beginner-friendly. I genuinely enjoyed creating a prototype for my project!
cons: As a new user, it would be helpful to have small pop-ups regarding the tools but then even without it, as long as you take your time to familiarize yourself with the software, you'll still be able to manage it independently.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Uizard - a great tool for launching products faster
description: I've already recommended Uizard to one of my clients who are considering utilizing the platform for their early design phase!
author: Syed A.
pros: I enjoy the feature that allows me to easily share my mockups with my design & development team.
cons: Some of the design options don't have as "professional" of a look that some of my client's expect during a demo.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Uizard Review
description: Very clunky, it is fast to make things but it is very hard to make them look professional and clean.
author: Luis A.
pros: I like all of the little buttons and templates that are ready to use.
cons: I don't like how clunky it feels. Uizard seriously needs snapping. Also, it would be nice to have a layers panel and to be able to lock layers. It is so easy to mess things up and ruin your alignment.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Uizard impacts my daily Design Projects
description: I enjoyed using this Uizard software, it's a lifesaver for Graphical User's and Students out there!
author: Crystal Pearl H.
pros: What I'd like the most about this software when I need to prototype the designs and projects are it is easy to learn and use it. I really enjoyed using this software because it really helps me to build my own designs, I like the interactions, I like the templates that they suggested or built on it, and this software has low and high fidelity that's why I really like it. Because I won't have a hard time finding software that has something I want to use like that. this Uizard Software It's really efficient and user-friendly. I highly recommended this software to my fellow Graphical User Also to student who is having a hard time finding the right software that might really help them in one time big time. An additional thing for this software is you will be able to get a pro membership with the help of accounts that you need to register to have you a Pro membership, and that's the good thing about it. Lastly, you can use this software with your team at the same time.
cons: From what I've experienced when im exploring this software while I'm doing my designs project is there is a tab there which is the theme I think. When I click on it my designs and format even the fonts, and the layout is changed. I'm really shocked because I spend my days working on it in a one-click it change my design in worst. Though there is undo button. but I'm not really aware that if you reload the page it can't be back or undo. That's why I felt bad about it, I'm starting again from the first layouts and designs it's a waste of my time. What I suggest is even if you reload the page I hope it will be able for the user to undo it once more.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Uizard Helps For Prototype Build
description: Overall experience it help me in so many ways as a person who does everything on it own. Uizard has the usefulness for me to create prototype and to build later and i like the feature where there is a wireframe where your draw and snap to include it in the software very good too but need to add more feature on that too.
author: Nisha N.
pros: It is impactful, easy to use and it does help with my current developing website. The software is also understandable and simple and the graphic is very nice.
cons: The only thing I feel the least is the features. On the section "Build" column where you change the color, the font size and everything I only wish if there is a font weight that can be control by the value like 500 or 900. The current one is okay maybe at like a value next to the style so it be easier for us developer to code later. One more will be if can add a customize font file into the font style or maybe call build a section where can use google font like in the Streamlabs software they add on the google font so we can change the font style. I mean it could help too. Else everything should be fine for me hehe quite good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: No coding experience necessary.
description: I used my creation in Uizard for my pitch deck and for my network to get a hands on experience with my business. People were impressed that with no experience I was able to create a mock up app and it’s because of how great the features on Uizard are. Uizard has also added me to their encouraging community and invited me to virtual events they host. I’ve learned more about how to get the most out of using the platform.
author: Cameron C.
pros: Uizard is very easy to use. Streamlined process and templates make it easy to start if you aren’t quite thorough in your vision yet.
cons: I haven’t found anything that has kept me from using this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Houssein houssainy review
description: It's good for me to make ui don't really try the ux feature yet.
author: Hssein H.
pros: I m learning ui ux and i use it so much to make wireframe. The handmade style icons and shape and text are so much cool and good for wireframing for me.
cons: when i switch from wireframe mode to prototype mode i have to reput every photo again and it take so much time to replace.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Surprised how simple it is to use and with amazing support!
description: Uizard promises AI scale from hand draw wireframes but I prefer do it by yourself virtually in Uizard itself.
author: Irena K.
pros: Uizard impressed me. It is not expensive at all and works perfect. It had some issues at the begging but support is listening and always improving their product.
cons: As all the tools that are trying to make you work fast and easy, it has limitations. But for the price amazing overall. You can definitely bring your imagination to reality. What I am missing is shape limitations.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: My first experience with a fantastic designing tool
description: I wanted to design prototypes for a small mobile application of 5 to 7 views. I didn't have any experience with ui design for mobile terminals. At the beginning, I wanted to use another well-known tool called Adobe XD but, fortunately I discovered UIzard and in 2 days , i succeeded and the result was just amazing.
author: Guy Stephane W.
pros: The thing I like the most about Uizard is that i allow to build an application's prototypes in very step and without deep knowledge in ui design. This is made possible by prebuilt templates.
cons: As a student, I don't have enough money to subscribe to a monthly package so I don't like pricing policy of this app.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: a good online product for wireframing and prototyping your business ideas
description: overall I was happy to find such an online tool which enabled me to conceptualize my ideas on the real-live-like wireframes and gave me good PoC outcome.
author: Abhishek S.
pros: I like the the ease of use - how quickly i was able to start my wireframing and create few pages in minutes.
cons: The product is bit expensive and have very limited templates to start with... so for a beginner it can be a tough task to move forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Decent, but needs a lot of improvement to smooth out the experience.
description: Overall experience was decent for a first attempt, but when sharing with others to view project most of them faced problems with Uizard’s interface loading (load times across the entire Uizard application are really long)
author: Rushton H.
pros: The ability to make the UX appear like a normal website or app is really nice
cons: The drag and drop functionality is clunky. Additionally, the way items are selected or grouped is difficult to control and quickly causing items to be misaligned
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Excelent Mock up Software for non Developers
description: This gives the sponsors of my software visual of the software with the ability to click around. This identifies potential problems very early in the planing process which saves time/money later
author: Sanida D.
pros: I am a Project Manager and not too technical and this tool is super easy to use. So great when you figure out the keyboard shortcuts. It enables me to communicate with the business without being dependent on the development team to create mock ups.
cons: No Copy and Paste feature of the screens from other projects. Although I did separate it initially so i guess its not a huge deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool to work on your idea
description: Uizard is a great tool for designing and prototyping mobile apps, web apps, websites, and desktop interfaces. The interface is very user-friendly and the tutorials are very helpful. I would definitely recommend Uizard to anyone looking for an easy-to-use tool for designing and prototyping.
author: Karan D.
pros: Uizard is a great software with an amazing UI. The ability to convert hand-drawn sketches into digital designs is fantastic and very user-friendly.
cons: There could be more free templates. The ones that are available are good, but I would like to see more.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Excellent Software for Website and Mobile Phone Application Prototyping
description: I have used this product to design prototypes for projects where I showcased my innovative designs in presentations. This allowed me to reveal my creative potential and share my insight of what my outlook is on the application design.
author: Zeeshan M.
pros: These software allowed flexibility and customizable options unlike any other software available for prototyping. The software allows for interactive designs that give the user a sense of understanding of the real product aimed to be developed.
cons: The software is very sensitive to the handling of objects such as text boxes, images, and buttons. However, it is still a great software.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Uizard Review
description: My overall experience is between good and neutral, as I know the software has potential but, because of its lack of ease of use, it's been complicated and slow to work on it.
author: Isidora T.
pros: In my opinion, Uizard is very helpful, as it offers a creative and collaborative way to design in my case, Wireframes for my website. The fact that it allows you to share it with team members and to edit simultaneously is a big plus for me. I like the overall design. It reminds me of Canva, which I love.
cons: The biggest downside is that it isn't intuitive to use. Me and my team have had a hard time moving the canvas, for example (we still haven't figured that out). Also, the keyboard shortcuts don't work on my computer. The interact section seems very helpful but I can´t use it because it only allows me to link a whole text box to another screen, and not a single word in that text box.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nicely done
description: I'm always looking on the internet to find new mockup tools available online with a nice range of free features and even if I sound like a stingy person saying that, you have been able to deliver it to me. Very nice product for sure
author: Destrée S.
pros: Preview mode is great. Path-making and animations let me deliver a mockup very close to the final product. Sketching view is good nice to have too.
cons: The app is good in what it should be doing. Note that it could be easier if the order of the elements (back, front, backwards, frontwards) was determined by views and not just a global order, because it can be tricky to change the order of an new element you put in an ancient view.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient tool for fast mockup prototyping
description: Four our simple UI/UX planning tasks the platform provides just what we need now. The sales team is really kind and active too!
author: Gergely M.
pros: Its really easy to start and use as a newcommer. Really intuitive UI. Really great presentation options.
cons: Lock function on components are missing, maybe better navigation on canvas would be grate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Uizard
author: Ingrid M.
pros: The ease of the interaction feature for flow. The ease of drag and drop.
cons: I’d like the AI to be able to generate my screenshots into exact copies of components over uploading sketches or color themes.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
